title: Soultide
description: A mod about Souls and Cool Weapons
body:
A simple mod adding a new tier of equipment, a new use for archaeology and possibly, (in future) a soul system similar to MCD!

---------------------------------------- ITEMS ----------------------------------------  
All tools also work as a weapon!
- Soul Knife -
Sword but Faster!

- Soul Sledgehammer -
Works as a Pickaxe! VERY Slow but VERY Powerful!

- Soul Double Axe -
Works as an Axe! Slow but Powerful! (and cool looking!)

- Soul Glaive -
Works as a Shovel! Pretty normal speed and damage, the closest to a sword!

- Soul Scythe -
Works as a Hoe! Kinda slow but pretty good?

- Soul Infused Armor -
Better than Netherite!™

- Soul Harvester Enchant -
Just like the Soul Upgrade Template, this enchant is found in Trail Ruins



----------------------------------- PLANNED ADDITIONS ----------------------------------

- Soul Bar -
Absorb Solidified Souls to charge up your soul bar for powerful abilities, such as:

- Soul Seeking Eye -
Use souls to give glowing to players around you!

- Harvester -
A throwback to MCD, but cooler!
